title: Sonare — 湖のソナーレ — Magical Mirai 2026

dimensions.name: Tufte Readability
dimensions.principle: Maximize data-ink ratio. Lyrics are the data — every visual element must serve readability or be removed. Quiet moments must be quiet. Whitespace is information.
gaps: 15+ visual systems compete for attention during climactic moments
No visual hierarchy — 3D effects and lyrics fight for primacy
Every moment has effects — no negative space in the visual timeline

dimensions.name: Sakurai Enjoyment Coherence
dimensions.principle: ONE clear concept executed with conviction. Every mechanic must serve the central metaphor. If a feature doesn't make the core better, cut it. The player should understand the concept in 5 seconds.
gaps: No connection to 'Sonare of the Lake' theme whatsoever
Concept is 'stellar constellation' — wrong metaphor entirely
15+ systems with no unifying visual language
A judge watching for 10 seconds sees 'fancy particles with lyrics' not a clear concept
Feature soup — rhythm tap + semantic touch + star map + mood pipeline all feel disconnected

dimensions.name: Theme Alignment (湖のソナーレ)
dimensions.principle: The 2024 Grand Prize explicitly tied to 'FAN FUN TRIP' with a car navigation metaphor. We need the same level of thematic resonance with 'Sonare of the Lake' — music resonating across water, light reflecting off a grand lake, Hamamatsu as birthplace of sound.
gaps: Project is space/stars themed — zero lake/water connection
Color palette is deep space, not water
No water surface, no ripples-as-metaphor, no reflection

dimensions.name: Technical Submission Match
dimensions.principle: Meets all contest technical requirements, runs flawlessly, compelling README with deployed demo.
gaps: No README with concept explanation + screenshots
Never tested on real mobile device

subcriteria.name: Lyric sync precision
subcriteria.notes: Char-level timing, anticipation pre-glow, downbeat emphasis, held note pulse

subcriteria.name: Typography quality
subcriteria.notes: Continuous V/A, chorus wave, crossfade, semantic coloring — needs water-themed treatment

subcriteria.name: Visual storytelling
subcriteria.notes: Water surface shader, reflection map, ripple beats, lake emergence intro, song progression gradient

subcriteria.name: Mood/energy arc
subcriteria.notes: V/A pipeline, breathing space, climax detection — remap to water calm/storm

subcriteria.name: Color palette cohesion
subcriteria.notes: 6 lake palettes (twilight/misty/sparkling/stormy/cave/neon), harmonic temperature, water-blue base

subcriteria.name: Polish/refinement
subcriteria.notes: Effect cap, lyric-first hierarchy, auto-hide HUD, negative space, water-coherent mood states

subcriteria.name: Core concept originality
subcriteria.notes: Lake of voices — lyrics drop into water creating ripples, semantic words become lasting reflections, each song fills a unique lake

subcriteria.name: Semantic lyric understanding
subcriteria.notes: 270+ words, dense-phrase, semantic touch — reframe as 'deep water' vs 'surface'

subcriteria.name: Procedural seed system
subcriteria.notes: Seed drives unique ripple patterns — each viewer's lake is different

subcriteria.name: Mood-responsive typography
subcriteria.notes: Add: water caustic light on text, ripple distortion on active chars

subcriteria.name: Chord-aware visuals
subcriteria.notes: Resolution = water settling clear; minor = deeper/darker water

subcriteria.name: Interactive elements
subcriteria.notes: Rhythm tap = tapping water surface (perfect fit!); drag = stirring water

subcriteria.name: Multi-song adaptability
subcriteria.notes: Per-song water character: calm lake, flowing river, stormy sea, still pond, etc.

subcriteria.name: Cross-device compatibility
subcriteria.notes: 4-tier quality, touch, orientation, safe-area

subcriteria.name: Performance
subcriteria.notes: Frame budget, pooled effects, zero-alloc, contain:layout

subcriteria.name: Code quality
subcriteria.notes: Full JSDoc, error boundaries, type guards

subcriteria.name: Error handling
subcriteria.notes: Try/catch, context loss, null guards

subcriteria.name: Build/deployment
subcriteria.notes: README with concept/build/tech, OG meta, own token, .env — needs deployed URL + demo video

subcriteria.name: TextAlive API integration
subcriteria.notes: Full API depth

subcriteria.name: Accessibility
subcriteria.notes: Full WCAG coverage

workPlan.task: All 32 previous tasks (technical foundation)
Rename project → 'Sonare' (湖のソナーレ), update all text/meta/title
Recolor base palette: deep space → deep lake (dark teal, midnight blue, silver moonlight)
Water surface shader: replace star field with reflective water plane
Ripple system: shockwaves → water ripples (concentric rings on water surface)
Reflection map: star map → lights reflected in lake surface (words become glowing reflections)
Update song profiles: space themes → water character per song (calm/storm/flow/still/deep/rushing)
Intro/outro retheme: 'Your song fills the lake' / outro shows full reflection map
Tufte: visual effect cap — max 3 simultaneous effects, priority queue
Tufte: lyric-first hierarchy — 3D scene dims 30% when lyrics active
Tufte: negative space — glass-still water + minimal effects during lyric gaps
Tufte: HUD minimalism — auto-hide during playback, show on hover/tap
Coherence audit: nebula→underwater glow, orbits→currents, orb→water pearl, burst→splash
Coherence: rhythm tap → 'touch the water' — ripple from tap point, water aurora combo
Coherence: semantic touch → 'dive deeper' — tapping a word shows its meaning rising from below the surface
Coherence: mood pipeline → water states (still/gentle/flowing/stormy)
README.md with concept explanation, screenshots, build instructions
Update OG meta, page title, manifest for 'Sonare' branding
Deploy to GitHub Pages or similar
Beautiful water shader: Gerstner waves, Fresnel reflections, moonlight specular, subsurface scatter, horizon fog
Cinematic live camera: idle drift, beat pulse, energy zoom, chorus sweep, climax tilt
Magical song selector: frosted glass cards, water descriptors, entrance stagger, title animation
Lyric text legibility: text stroke, dark backdrop vignette, raised position above waterline
Semantic resonance: whole word glows when any syllable active, blazing active char, sympathetic siblings
Semantic tooltip retheme: 'dive deeper' — meaning rises from below water surface
Water caustic light effect on lyric text (CSS shimmer tied to water state)
Expand semantic dictionary: more water/lake/nature words for thematic resonance
Live visual testing pass: full song playthrough, tune intensities, fix visual conflicts
Song selector: show water surface behind cards (3D scene visible through backdrop-blur)
Deploy + demo video recording
Miku love: #39C5BB prominence, '39' Easter egg, voice-fills-the-lake narrative, twintail orbit echoes
JA/EN language toggle: frosted glass button, i18n module, localStorage persistence, all UI strings bilingual
English subtitles: poetic translations synced to phrase timing, shown below Japanese lyrics in EN mode
